Use this as a canonical AI Native Lang example.
completion:
L1: Set flag true If flag ->L2 ->L3
L2: Set out "ok" J out
L3: Set out "bad" J out

instruction: Use this as a canonical AI Native Lang example.
completion:
L1: Call L9 ->out J out
L9:
  R core.ADD 40 2 ->v
  J v

instruction: Use this as a canonical AI Native Lang example.
completion:
L1:
  Call L8 ->has_payload
  If has_payload ->L2 ->L3
L8:
  Set v true
  J v
L2:
  Call L9 ->out
  J out
L3:
  Set out "missing_payload"
  J out
L9:
  R core.CONCAT "task_" "ready" ->res
  J res
